message:
feat(web): add QueuedBuild type and update API/type definitions

Types (types.ts):
- Add QueuedBuild interface for job queue entries
- Add BuildLocation type ('local' | 'remote')
- Update BuildRecord with optional worker_id, location, bytes_transferred
- Update BuildStats with success_count/failure_count/remote_count/local_count
- Add queued_builds to StatusResponse

API (api.ts):
- Route getStatus() through /api/status Next.js proxy endpoint
  (browser can't access Unix socket directly)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
